title: onosma gracilis
intro: Onosma gracilis, also known as the small fringed onosma or small fringed onosmia, is a flowering plant species within the family Apocynaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its bioactive compounds and has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Onosma gracilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Onosma gracilis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
